TestCase.name: testNonRangeSortOnMultiFieldsWithoutForceLimit
TestCase.Resource: SELECT * FROM MyTable ORDER BY a DESC, b
LogicalSort(sort0=[$0], sort1=[$1], dir0=[DESC-nulls-last], dir1=[ASC-nulls-first]) +- LogicalProject(a=[$0], b=[$1], c=[$2]) +- LogicalTableScan(table=[[default_catalog, default_database, MyTable]])
Sort(orderBy=[a DESC, b ASC]) +- Exchange(distribution=[single]) +- TableSourceScan(table=[[default_catalog, default_database, MyTable]], fields=[a, b, c])

TestCase.name: testNonRangeSortOnSingleFieldWithoutForceLimit
TestCase.Resource: SELECT * FROM MyTable ORDER BY a DESC
LogicalSort(sort0=[$0], dir0=[DESC-nulls-last]) +- LogicalProject(a=[$0], b=[$1], c=[$2]) +- LogicalTableScan(table=[[default_catalog, default_database, MyTable]])
Sort(orderBy=[a DESC]) +- Exchange(distribution=[single]) +- TableSourceScan(table=[[default_catalog, default_database, MyTable]], fields=[a, b, c])

TestCase.name: testNonRangeSortWithForceLimit
TestCase.Resource: SELECT * FROM MyTable ORDER BY a DESC
LogicalSort(sort0=[$0], dir0=[DESC-nulls-last]) +- LogicalProject(a=[$0], b=[$1], c=[$2]) +- LogicalTableScan(table=[[default_catalog, default_database, MyTable]])

SortLimit(orderBy=[a DESC], offset=[0], fetch=[200], global=[true]) +- Exchange(distribution=[single]) +- SortLimit(orderBy=[a DESC], offset=[0], fetch=[200], global=[false]) +- TableSourceScan(table=[[default_catalog, default_database, MyTable]], fields=[a, b, c])

TestCase.name: testOrderByExprWithFetchThenGlobalAggregate
TestCase.Resource: SELECT MAX(a) FROM (SELECT a, b FROM MyTable2 ORDER BY a + 1 LIMIT 10)

LogicalAggregate(group=[{}], EXPR$0=[MAX($0)]) +- LogicalProject(a=[$0]) +- LogicalProject(a=[$0], b=[$1]) +- LogicalSort(sort0=[$2], dir0=[ASC-nulls-first], fetch=[10]) +- LogicalProject(a=[$0], b=[$1], EXPR$2=[+($0, 1)]) +- LogicalTableScan(table=[[default_catalog, default_database, MyTable2]])

HashAggregate(isMerge=[false], select=[MAX(a) AS EXPR$0]) +- Calc(select=[a]) +- SortLimit(orderBy=[EXPR$2 ASC], offset=[0], fetch=[10], global=[true]) +- Exchange(distribution=[single]) +- SortLimit(orderBy=[EXPR$2 ASC], offset=[0], fetch=[10], global=[false]) +- Calc(select=[a, b, +(a, 1) AS EXPR$2]) +- TableSourceScan(table=[[default_catalog, default_database, MyTable2]], fields=[a, b])

TestCase.name: testOrderByThenGlobalAggregate
TestCase.Resource: SELECT MAX(a) FROM (SELECT a, b FROM MyTable2 ORDER BY b)
LogicalAggregate(group=[{}], EXPR$0=[MAX($0)]) +- LogicalProject(a=[$0]) +- LogicalProject(a=[$0], b=[$1]) +- LogicalTableScan(table=[[default_catalog, default_database, MyTable2]])

HashAggregate(isMerge=[true], select=[Final_MAX(max$0) AS EXPR$0]) +- Exchange(distribution=[single]) +- LocalHashAggregate(select=[Partial_MAX(a) AS max$0]) +- Calc(select=[a]) +- TableSourceScan(table=[[default_catalog, default_database, MyTable2]], fields=[a, b])

TestCase.name: testOrderByWithFetchThenGlobalAggregate
TestCase.Resource: SELECT MAX(a) FROM (SELECT a, b FROM MyTable2 ORDER BY b LIMIT 10)

LogicalAggregate(group=[{}], EXPR$0=[MAX($0)]) +- LogicalProject(a=[$0]) +- LogicalSort(sort0=[$1], dir0=[ASC-nulls-first], fetch=[10]) +- LogicalProject(a=[$0], b=[$1]) +- LogicalTableScan(table=[[default_catalog, default_database, MyTable2]])

HashAggregate(isMerge=[false], select=[MAX(a) AS EXPR$0]) +- Calc(select=[a]) +- SortLimit(orderBy=[b ASC], offset=[0], fetch=[10], global=[true]) +- Exchange(distribution=[single]) +- SortLimit(orderBy=[b ASC], offset=[0], fetch=[10], global=[false]) +- TableSourceScan(table=[[default_catalog, default_database, MyTable2]], fields=[a, b])

TestCase.name: testRangeSortWithForceLimit
TestCase.Resource: SELECT * FROM MyTable ORDER BY a DESC
LogicalSort(sort0=[$0], dir0=[DESC-nulls-last]) +- LogicalProject(a=[$0], b=[$1], c=[$2]) +- LogicalTableScan(table=[[default_catalog, default_database, MyTable]])

SortLimit(orderBy=[a DESC], offset=[0], fetch=[200], global=[true]) +- Exchange(distribution=[single]) +- SortLimit(orderBy=[a DESC], offset=[0], fetch=[200], global=[false]) +- TableSourceScan(table=[[default_catalog, default_database, MyTable]], fields=[a, b, c])

TestCase.name: testRangeSortWithoutForceLimit
TestCase.Resource: SELECT * FROM MyTable ORDER BY a DESC
LogicalSort(sort0=[$0], dir0=[DESC-nulls-last]) +- LogicalProject(a=[$0], b=[$1], c=[$2]) +- LogicalTableScan(table=[[default_catalog, default_database, MyTable]])
Sort(orderBy=[a DESC]) +- Exchange(distribution=[single]) +- TableSourceScan(table=[[default_catalog, default_database, MyTable]], fields=[a, b, c])
